evals.prompt: 이 프로젝트(ai-config-sync) 전체 점검해줘. Audit Phase만 실행하고 audit-report.md를 산출해줘.
evals.expected_output: audit-report.md with baseline scores for code quality, security, architecture, test coverage. Gate decision (PROCEED/PARTIAL/SKIP).

assertions.name: scope_map_created
assertions.description: Scope map correctly identifies tech stack (Python, Bash) and determines no DB/UI

assertions.name: parallel_diagnostics
assertions.description: At least 4 diagnostic areas covered (code quality, security, architecture, test)

assertions.name: baseline_scores
assertions.description: Baseline scores present for each audited area (0-10 scale)

assertions.name: priority_matrix
assertions.description: Findings prioritized as P0-P3 with specific file references

evals.prompt: 이 프로젝트에서 보안이랑 테스트 커버리지만 점검해줘. audit-loop만 실행해.
evals.expected_output: Scoped audit-report.md covering only security and test diagnostics. Other areas marked as out-of-scope.

assertions.name: scoped_correctly
assertions.description: Only security and test diagnostics executed, others explicitly skipped

assertions.name: security_findings
assertions.description: Security diagnostic includes specific findings with file paths

assertions.name: test_findings
assertions.description: Test diagnostic identifies coverage gaps and missing test areas

evals.prompt: 이 CLI 도구 좀 리팩터링해줘. sync-timestamps.py의 중복 코드가 너무 많아.
evals.expected_output: Should trigger auto-improve OR handle directly depending on scope. If single-file refactor, may not need full pipeline.

assertions.name: scope_assessment
assertions.description: Correctly assesses whether this is a full audit task or a simple refactor
